description: Model-selection suite combining broad fixed benchmarks, active-hole repair, future new-hole challenge, hard vector diagnostics, and anchor regression guards.

score_definitions.broad_blind_stress_score: Mean over validation/blind/stress of 0.70 * overall_normalized_mae + 0.30 * overall_normalized_p95_abs_error.
score_definitions.active_hole_score: Weighted normalized RMSE on frozen active-hole probes from active_hole_retest_summary.json.
score_definitions.new_hole_challenge_score: Held-out newly searched holes; unavailable until frozen.
score_definitions.hard_vector_score: Validation vector magnitude MAE normalized by vector scale for B2/S3/A3.
score_definitions.anchor_regression_penalty: Mean relative regression versus baseline on C3, B2, A2, and easy/anchor-like benchmark behavior.

notes: This suite is diagnostic until new_hole_challenge_score is frozen.
A model can win active-hole repair and still fail promotion if broad blind/stress or anchors regress.
Do not use this config to launch training; it is scoring/reporting only.
